javadoc_before:
/** * Gets the extension (i.e. the part after the last ".") of a file. *

* Will return an empty string if the file name doesn't contain any dots. Only the last segment of a the file name is consulted - i.e. all leading * directories of the {@code file name} parameter are skipped. *

* * @return the extension of file name * @param path the path of the file to obtain the extension of. * @since 1.22 */
javadoc_after:
/** * Gets the extension (i.e. the part after the last ".") of a file. *

* Will return an empty string if the file name doesn't contain any dots. Only the last segment of a the file name is consulted - i.e. all leading * directories of the {@code file name} parameter are skipped. *

* * @return the extension of file name * @param path the path of the file to obtain the extension of. * @since 1.22 * @deprecated Use {@link PathUtils#getExtension(Path)}. */
